feat1.title: See Sales Prices
feat1.desc: 15 years of ship sales prices included in our base package. Add or edit when you know better.

feat2.title: Smart Inbox
feat2.desc: Connect your email via IMAP/SMTP. AI automatically links every email to the right ship and extracts sale statuses and purchase enquiries — no manual work required.

feat3.title: See Fleet
feat3.desc: IHS World fleet integrated. Quick search or advanced search by ship criteria. Segment specific views available.

feat4.title: Live Vessel Tracking
feat4.desc: See where every ship is right now. AIS positions, speed, draught and ETA — all visible directly from the fleet list.

feat5.title: See Team Input
feat5.desc: All your team logs about the ships, available in seconds. No one else sees it!
